role_zh: 创始人 & 首席执行官
bio_en: Hello, I'm Benze, Founder and CEO of KCVA. I specialize in tournament operations and strategic partnerships, bringing an avant-garde vision to the international school sports scene. As a decisive leader and referee, I thrive in managing high-stakes coordination and ensuring seamless execution from the boardroom to the court.
bio_zh: 大家好，我是 Benze，KCVA 创始人兼 CEO。我负责赛事运营与战略合作，为国际学校体育场景带来前卫视野。作为果断的领导者与裁判，我擅长高压协调，确保从会议室到赛场的每一个环节无缝执行。

role_zh: 排球协调员 & 现场顾问
bio_en: As our go-to volleyball coordinator, I linked up partnering schools beforehand. Also, working as host and on-site consultant for the tourney, I share insights from managing my school’s volleyball team and participating clubs to polish event details.
bio_zh: 作为我们首选的排球协调员，我提前联络了合作学校。同时，作为赛事主持人和现场顾问，我分享管理学校排球队和参与社团的经验，以打磨活动细节。

role_zh: 活动经理 & 裁判协调员
bio_en: I excel in event management, handling venue coordination and school liaison to ensure everything runs smoothly. With 7 years of sports experience, I also serve as a fair and efficient referee. Whether handling on-field officiating or behind-the-scenes control, I adapt quickly and bring strong communication and collaboration skills.
bio_zh: 我擅长活动管理，负责场地协调与学校联络，确保一切顺利进行。凭借 7 年的运动经验，我也担任公正高效的裁判。无论是场上执法还是幕后调度，我都能快速适应，并具备优秀的沟通与协作能力。

role_zh: 活动管理 & 赞助商联络
bio_en: Hi！ I am Chris. I am responsible for event management and on-site layout. Contacting the sponsor. I've been conducting sports through secondary and high school. Therefore, I am aware for different situations and circumstances and deal with them calmly.
bio_zh: 嗨！我是 Chris。我负责活动管理与现场布置，联系赞助商。我在中学和高中一直参与体育活动，因此能够了解不同情况并冷静处理。

bio_en: As a technical engineer at KSVG, I ensure that all digital systems, live scoring, and broadcast tools run flawlessly. I also help maintain the league's website and data integrity, bringing reliable tech support to every match.
bio_zh: 作为 KSVG 的技术工程师，我确保所有数字系统、实时计分和直播工具正常运行。我还协助维护联赛的网站与数据完整性，为每一场比赛提供可靠的技术支持。

role_zh: 商务联络 & 现场经理
bio_en: Hi！I'm Katherine, in charge of business liaison and on-site management, adept at cross-team coordination to secure smooth events. I enjoy frisbee and fencing, which sharpen my quick on-spot judgment.
bio_zh: 嗨！我是 Katherine，负责商务联络与现场管理，擅长跨团队协调确保活动顺畅。我喜欢飞盘和击剑，这些运动磨练了我的快速判断力。

role_zh: 学校协调 & 场地经理
bio_en: Hello! I'm Ivory. I’m good at coordinating with schools, managing event venues and communicating with school staff to make activities go well. I love playing volleyball and badminton, and I also enjoy playing the drums. No matter when I need to handle on-site management or school follow-ups, I can get used to new tasks quickly and bring solid communication skills to team cooperation.
bio_zh: 大家好！我是 Ivory。我擅长与学校协调、管理活动场地以及与校方人员沟通，使活动顺利进行。我喜欢打排球和羽毛球，也喜欢打架子鼓。无论是现场管理还是学校跟进，我都能快速适应新任务，并为团队合作带来扎实的沟通能力。
